dashboard.label: ZKSplunk Operator Summary
dashboard.description: Functional cluster summary for the 1AM Midnight node operator.

search.query: index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status latest(severity) as severity by component | eval status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | stats count(eval(status="critical" OR status="error")) as critical count(eval(status="warning" OR status="warn")) as warning count as components | eval cluster_status=case(critical>0,"critical",warning>0,"warning",components>0,"healthy",true(),"unknown") | table cluster_status

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status by component | stats count as components

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status latest(severity) as severity by component | eval status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | where status="warning" OR status="warn" | stats count as warnings

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status latest(severity) as severity by component | eval status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | where status="critical" OR status="error" | stats count as critical

panel.title: Functional unit: component status and geography

search.query: | inputlookup zksplunk_component_locations.csv | join type=left component [ search index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") earliest=-15m | stats latest(status) as status latest(severity) as severity latest(response_time_ms) as response_time_ms latest(_time) as last_update latest(message) as message by component ] | eval status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | eval response_time_ms=coalesce(response_time_ms,"-") | eval last_update=if(isnull(last_update),"no data",strftime(last_update,"%H:%M:%S")) | table operator_id component component_type location_label status response_time_ms last_update message | sort component

index=zksplunk earliest=-60m | where status="critical" OR severity="critical" OR send_status="failed" | eval t=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table t component type status severity response_time_ms message error_message | sort -t
